theme_toggle_auto_label: Theme mode: auto (system). Click to switch to light mode.
theme_toggle_mode_label: Theme mode: {mode}. Click to switch mode.
home_title: Ship from a starter that actually exercises the stack.
home_description: This baseline now includes a shared app shell, real auth entry routes, and a persistent todo slice wired through oRPC, TanStack DB, and Drizzle.
home_feature_shell_description: Theme, locale, navigation, and auth state live in one place.
home_feature_data_description: Todos are scoped to the signed-in user and persisted in PostgreSQL.
home_feature_auth_description: Sign up and sign in routes are ready for local development.
about_title: What this starter now covers end to end.
about_description: The goal is a truthful baseline: shared layout, guarded auth flows, a persistent data example, and the core docs to extend it safely.
about_item_shell: TanStack Start routes with a mounted global header and footer.
about_item_orpc: Authenticated oRPC procedures consumed from the client.
about_item_db: Drizzle + PostgreSQL for the server-side todo slice.
about_item_auth: Better Auth wired to the same database connection.
auth_login_title: Sign in to keep working from the starter baseline.
auth_login_description: Use Better Auth with the colocated `/api/auth` route and the shared Postgres connection.
auth_signup_title: Create a local account backed by Better Auth.
auth_signup_description: This route gives the starter a working auth entrypoint instead of a disconnected session widget.
auth_generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
not_found_description: The route you requested does not exist or is no longer available.
todos_title: Protected TanStack DB board backed by PostgreSQL.
todos_description: This route disables SSR, preloads a client-side TanStack DB collection, and syncs optimistic mutations through authenticated oRPC procedures.
todos_error_title: Your session is no longer available.
todos_error_description: Sign back in to reload your private collection.
todos_form_title_placeholder: Ship a guarded TanStack DB feature
todos_form_notes_placeholder: Add context that should survive refreshes and sync back to Postgres.
todos_form_hint: Optimistic TanStack DB mutations are synced through the protected oRPC router.
todos_empty_state: No matching todos yet. Add one to see live filtered views update.
